title: Subnet Calculator Shortcut
when_to_use: When mapping network zones and understanding scope boundaries

steps.title: Apply Subnet Mask
steps.tip: The mask tells you which bits are network (1s) and which are host (0s)

steps.title: Network Address
steps.instruction: Network address: first address in range
steps.tip: AND the IP with the mask. All host bits become 0. This is the network identifier

steps.title: Broadcast Address
steps.instruction: Broadcast address: last address in range
steps.tip: Set all host bits to 1. This is the broadcast address for the subnet

steps.title: Usable Hosts
steps.instruction: Usable hosts: total minus 2 (network and broadcast)
steps.tip: Total hosts = 2^(32-prefix) - 2. The network and broadcast addresses aren't assignable

steps.title: Common Shortcuts
steps.tip: Memorise these. In the field, you'll calculate subnets constantly. Speed matters
